name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-31
title: tdd-step.py spec-update gate uses HEAD diff so committed-uncommitted spec edits are invisible
description: tdd-step.py cmd_transition (lines 323-338) gates spec-update -> test-red by running git diff HEAD -- <feature>/docs/spec/ to detect spec changes. But after rabbit-feature-touch Step 3 commits spec changes (per Inv 16), git diff HEAD shows NO changes (because they were just committed). The transition will then fail unless --spec-no-change-reason is supplied. So the spec invariants 13/16 sequence (commit spec, then dispatch subagent that calls test-red transition) is broken: the subagent always needs --spec-no-change-reason even when spec did change. Fix: gate against last commit (HEAD~1) on the spec dir, or check whether HEAD's last commit touched the spec dir, or pass spec-change state forward differently.

history.note: Fixed: STEP 1 SPEC-READ now uses git diff HEAD~1 instead of HEAD. Subagent now actually sees the spec delta after rabbit-feature-touch Step 3's pre-dispatch spec commit.
